data.title: Novartis Commits $23 Billion To Expand US Manufacturing Over Five Years, Despite Tariffs Uncertainties
data.description: Novartis commits $23 billion to expand U.S. manufacturing and R&D with 10 new facilities, aiming to produce all key U.S. medicines domestically and add thousands of jobs.

data.title: Are Chinese Tech Stocks At A 'Serious Risk' Amid Escalating Trade War? 'Delisting Is Moving Up In The List Of Retaliatory Options,' Says Analyst
data.description: China's tech stocks are grappling with potential challenges that could have a more significant impact than President Donald Trump's tariffs.

data.title: Why Are Janover Stocks Surging On Friday?

data.title: Sony, Nintendo Hike Console Prices As US Tariffs Bite, Microsoft May Dodge The Hit
data.description: Nintendo and Sony plan price hikes on game consoles due to US tariffs, with consumers potentially paying up to 30% more. Microsoft may have smoother sales.

data.title: This Stock Is No Child's Play With A Bet On Silver Economy
data.description: A bet on the silver economy, revenue diversification, and an attractive relative valuation make this stock interesting, but not risk-free.
